{"BaseResp":{"StatusCode":0,"StatusMessage":"success"},"code":0,"data":{"common_list_info":{"cursor":"","has_more":false,"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260321141053D56CC5AE64AC10C92B18\"}"},"total":1},"data_list":[{"comment":{"comment_id":"7450430479566635787","common":{"comment_type":0,"content":{"image_data_list":{},"text":"而且书中的描写很有画面感，让我仿佛身临其境。想起自己的学生时代，也有过类似的好奇心和冒险精神。不过，要是我也像书里的主角一样发现了什么神秘的手稿，那可就太刺激了！这本书很适合喜欢恐怖故事的人，读起来很过瘾！","text_exts":[{"e":93,"s":89,"text":"恐怖故事","tp":4,"uri":"dragon1967://search?source=44\u0026hyperlink_type=quote_book\u0026directQueryWord=%E6%81%90%E6%80%96%E6%95%85%E4%BA%8B\u0026directSearchSourceId=cmt_link%23177407345310C92B18%230%23%23\u0026directTabType=0\u0026reportDict=%7B%22comment_id%22%3A%227450430479566635787%22%2C%22enter_from_book_id%22%3A%227350597733259938878%22%2C%22hyperlink_position%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%2C%22hyperlink_type%22%3A%22quote_book%22%2C%22link_name%22%3A%22%E6%81%90%E6%80%96%E6%95%85%E4%BA%8B%22%2C%22search_sec_entrance%22%3A%22book_cover_comment_list_page%22%7D\u0026halfscreen=false"}]},"content_type":0,"create_timestamp":1732968757,"group_id":"7350597733259938878","service_id":2,"status":1,"user_info":{"base_info":{"description":"错过的年华在北漠开出斑斓的紫薇花，却荒芜了轮回的春夏。","encode_user_id":"#c1967_MTk2NzE5NjcxOTY3MTk2N4Pc6XwQMQm6t3teF0u+UMI=","gender":1,"is_cancelled":false,"profile_gender":0,"user_avatar":"http://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/tos-cn-i-1yzifmftcy/bf18d0e2d15c42539d39f88584f0abe3~tplv-s85hriknmn-jpeg-v1:144:0.jpeg?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1776615645\u0026x-signature=riLUJvGeDY8id7cNy2w1XF81w5k%3D","user_id":"343514996805518","user_name":"立场简单"},"expand_extra":{},"user_id":"343514996805518","user_relation":{"can_follow":true,"relation_type":1},"user_tag":{"fan_rank_num":0,"fan_ranklist_title":"","is_author":false,"is_blue_vip":false,"is_cp":false,"is_official_cert":false,"is_vip":false,"user_title_info":[]}}},"expand":{"book_id":"7350597733259938878","book_info":{"abstract":"在我的祖宅中有一个很少有人进入的屋子，我靠，那屋子黑得跟阎王殿似的，我平时也不敢进入，那一天就是邪门了，我稀里糊涂的爬进去了，结果意外发现了一个破箱子，破得跟我二姑奶奶的三舅母的牙齿。不过我在里面找到了一部手稿，一个个恐怖神秘的离奇故事就展现在眼前了……夜色浓浓，星光璀璨，我点上一支烟，漫步在母校的林荫道上，感慨万千。这是一座全国闻名的师范大学，我在这里度过了美好的四年时光，如今故地重游，往事尽浮眼底，是啊，学生时代一去不复返了。","audio_thumb_uri":"https://p3-novel.byteimg.com/img/novel-pic/4e117231b09a098b3beb587e9602f3a6~tplv-tt-cs0:440:440.image","author":"北京大理创作室 编著","author_id":"","book_id":"7350597733259938878","book_name":"猛鬼发之一——谜团","book_short_name":"","book_type":"0","color_dominate":"#106090","creation_status":"0","genre":"6","genre_type":"160","read_count_text":"11人读过","reader_schema":{"authorize_type":"0","category_schema":"[{\"category_id\":751,\"name\":\"悬疑灵异\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=751\u0026name=悬疑灵异\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":10,\"name\":\"悬疑\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=10\u0026name=悬疑\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":61,\"name\":\"推理\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=61\u0026name=推理\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":400,\"name\":\"现实小说\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=400\u0026name=现实小说\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":505,\"name\":\"破案\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=505\u0026name=破案\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"},{\"category_id\":871,\"name\":\"第一人称\",\"schema\":\"dragon1967://newCategoryDetail?id=871\u0026name=第一人称\u0026genre_type=160\u0026gender=2\u0026source=detail\"}]","first_chapter_item_id":"7350597804101733430","read_count":"0","title_page_tags":"","word_number":"9"},"relate_post_id":"","relate_post_schema":"","score":"8.1","serial_count":"1","tags":"悬疑灵异,现实小说,悬疑,推理,破案,第一人称","thumb_url":"https://p3-reading-sign.fqnovelpic.com/novel-pic/4e117231b09a098b3beb587e9602f3a6~tplv-noop.image?lk3s=9b9bd2b1\u0026x-expires=1779257453\u0026x-signature=pWSxPF7uIHNGQZqWZoHmNTz%2BAqo%3D","tomato_book_status":"1"},"book_info_list":[],"common_stat":{},"creator_id":"0","extra":{"comment_jump_schema":"","novelapp_read_item_cnt":""},"log_extra":{"recommend_info":"{\"channel_id\":\"\",\"request_id\":\"20260321141053D56CC5AE64AC10C92B18\"}"},"relate_info_list":[],"reply_show_count":0,"reply_show_row":0,"score":"8","score_suffix_text":"阅读3小时后点评"}
